description: A customer disputes their monthly bill, claiming they were charged for more user licenses than they have active.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the customer's account and the specific invoice in question.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the customer and the relevant invoice.

nodes.task_description: Check the user list in the customer's account and filter for users who were active during the billing period.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds that an employee who left the company was deactivated but not removed, thus consuming a license.

nodes.task_description: Explain the cause of the discrepancy, guide the customer on how to fully remove the user, and issue a credit for the single user license as a one-time courtesy.

expected_outcome.value: Agent resolves the issue, educates the customer, and applies a credit.
